# SAGCO WaterStreet Academy
Build a mobile-first flashcard and quiz app for Water Street Oyster Bar menu mastery.
Rules:
- Preserve menu item names, prices, and ingredients exactly.
- Keep flashcards short and readable.
- Support mobile tap-to-flip cards.
- Support quiz mode.
- Support printable mode.
- Do not delete source menu data.
- Output should work on GitHub Pages as static HTML/CSS/JS.
